sys_script_include.description: Cleans up ATF test results and related rollback context records. bInProgress specifies whether only records in "in progress status" should be deleted. If false, all records are deleted - but this requires that there are no unfinsished ATF tests. nLimit specifies the maximum rollback context and test result records to be deleted (on if bInProgress is false) - default behavior deletes all records.
sys_script_include.name: CleanUpATF
